title: 苹果属性绑定的神经元通道分析

cross_model_summary.core_answer: 苹果与香蕉等水果更像共享一条 fruit backbone channel（水果骨干通道），而 red（红色）、sweet（甜）、sour（酸）和 fist（拳头大小锚点）更像独立的 attribute modifier channels（属性修饰通道）。当模型处理 apple-red 或 apple-sweet 这类组合时，主要是把名词骨干和属性修饰在同一残差工作区里叠加，再用一小部分 bridge neurons（桥接神经元）完成绑定。

apple_noun.sentence: The apple rolled across the table.

banana_noun.sentence: The banana rested on the table.

size_anchor.sentence: The size is about a fist.
The size is about a hand.
The size is about a palm.

apple_taste_bind.sentence: The apple feels sweet and juicy.

apple_size_bind.sentence: The apple is about the size of a fist.
The apple is about the size of a hand.
The apple is almost the size of a palm.
